ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "input_length" INTEGER /* Length of the input data for the algorithm */,
  "rhc" REAL /* Run time complexity of the algorithm */,
  "sa" REAL /* Sample accuracy of the algorithm */,
  "ga" REAL /* General accuracy of the algorithm */,
  "mimic" REAL /* Resources utilized by the algorithm */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation entry */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "input_format" TEXT /* Format of the input data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "input_size" INTEGER /* Size of the input data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the algorithm */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the algorithm */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithms_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES algorithm_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation took place */,
  "evaluated_by" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "input_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input data used for the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_utilization" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource utilization entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the resource usage */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage during evaluation */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB during evaluation */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage in MB during evaluation */,
  "gpu_usage" REAL /* GPU usage percentage during evaluation */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Network usage in MB during evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_utilization_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation this parameter is associated with */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., seconds, megabytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_parameters_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparative_analysis" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "algorithm_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first algorithm in the comparison */,
  "algorithm_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second algorithm in the comparison */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparative analysis was conducted */,
  "analysis_performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who conducted the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the comparative analysis (e.g., A/B testing, cross-validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analysis_algorithm_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id_b") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analysis_algorithm_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id_a") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES algorithm_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in the version */,
  "is_current_version" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current active version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
